calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-23-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness: Gwendolyn Washington, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Jamie Crosby.
Exhibit 1- Lease Agreement---------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Fourteen-Day Notice dtd 02-07-06----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Declaration on Proof of Service of Notice dtd 03-15-06------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1150 Palou Ave., Apt. K, San Francisco.
Lease is forfeited.
Past-due Rent $999.00
Holdover Damages $3,906.71
Costs $200.00, for a Total of $5,105.71
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Off Calendar
